title: SYNTHETIC SAMPLE - Aurora Widget Assembly Guide
content: THIS IS A SYNTHETIC RECORD, NOT REAL CORPUS DATA. It exists only to document the schema of data/large_knowledge_base.json, whose real records are not republished in this repository pending dataset license verification. The fictional Aurora Widget Company assembles Model-A widgets in three stages: frame casting, coil winding, and calibration. Each stage records a pass/fail status in the plant ledger.

title: SYNTHETIC SAMPLE - Aurora Widget Warranty Policy
content: THIS IS A SYNTHETIC RECORD, NOT REAL CORPUS DATA. Fictional policy text: Model-A widgets carry a 24-month warranty covering coil and frame defects. Calibration drift is covered for 6 months. Warranty claims require the plant ledger serial and the original calibration report.

title: SYNTHETIC SAMPLE - Aurora Support FAQ, Shipping
content: THIS IS A SYNTHETIC RECORD, NOT REAL CORPUS DATA. Fictional FAQ text: Standard shipping for widget orders takes 5 business days inside the fictional region of Northland. Expedited shipping takes 2 business days. Orders above 40 units ship freight and include a packing manifest.

title: SYNTHETIC SAMPLE - Aurora Returns Procedure
content: THIS IS A SYNTHETIC RECORD, NOT REAL CORPUS DATA. Fictional procedure text: Returns are accepted within 30 days with the packing manifest. Refunds post to the original payment method in 7 business days. Widgets with calibration drift beyond tolerance are exchanged rather than refunded.

title: SYNTHETIC SAMPLE - Aurora Model-B Release Notes
content: THIS IS A SYNTHETIC RECORD, NOT REAL CORPUS DATA. Fictional release notes: Model-B widgets add a self-calibration loop and a sealed coil housing. The plant ledger schema gains a firmware_version field. Model-A accessories remain compatible except the external calibration jig.
